name: Get Hired
short_description: "Get Hired" explores resisting the corrupt capitalist systems that try to force you to become a part of them. As you move toward this system, which will make you work long hours and turn your life into torture, carefully reconsider your choices and decide what is best for you.
detailed_description:
Short Information

Get Hired is about trying to get a job at a corrupt company. However, this job is not as easy as it seems because the company's employees will try to stop you.

Gameplay

In Get Hired, your goal is to get through obstacles and solve puzzles to reach the upper floor. On the top floor, you must talk to the Boss and choose the right dialogues to get hired.

Different Endings

Depending on your actions and choices, you can get different endings in the game.
